description: Scottsdale AZ nonprofit museum preserving aviation history. Paul volunteers as docent Tue/Thu 9 AM-12 PM.
name: Aviation Heritage Museum

description: Regional airline carrier. Paul served as Captain for 35 years (1988-2023), flying 737/757/767/777.
name: SkyBridge Airlines

description: AOPA — aviation advocacy and community. Paul maintains honorary member status post-retirement.
name: Aircraft Owners and Pilots Association

description: ALPA — union Paul was a member of during his SkyBridge career.
name: Air Line Pilots Association

description: Scottsdale AZ community church. Paul and Judith attend Sunday 8:30 AM service.
name: Desert Springs Community Church

description: Aircraft manufacturer. Paul flew Boeing 737/757/767/777 across his career and follows their commercial fleet updates.
name: Boeing

description: United States civil aviation regulator. Paul follows airworthiness directives and safety bulletins from his Part 121 years.
name: Federal Aviation Administration

description: Independent federal agency investigating civil transportation accidents. Paul reads their aviation accident reports closely.
name: National Transportation Safety Board

description: Smithsonian museum of flight and spaceflight history. A reference point for the Aviation Heritage Museum's exhibit work.
name: Smithsonian National Air and Space Museum

description: Engine manufacturer for the wide-body aircraft Paul flew. He follows their commercial powerplant programs.
name: GE Aerospace

description: Scottsdale Airpark general aviation field. Paul follows airfield notices and the based flight school activity.
name: Scottsdale Airport

description: Commemorative Air Force — preserves and flies historic military aircraft. Paul follows their restoration and airshow work.
name: Commemorative Air Force

description: Experimental Aircraft Association, host of AirVenture. Paul follows their general aviation and homebuilt community.
name: Experimental Aircraft Association

description: Desert Ridge Wealth Partners. Manages Paul's retirement investment portfolio with quarterly reviews.
name: Desert Ridge Wealth Partners

description: Member-owned credit union in the Phoenix metro. Paul holds checking and savings here.
name: Sonoran Federal Credit Union

description: Professional golfers' tour. Paul follows tournament coverage and the Champions Tour schedule.
name: PGA Tour

description: Cable network covering tournaments, instruction, and lifestyle programming. Paul's most-watched channel.
name: Golf Channel

description: Phoenix Sky Harbor International Airport. Paul's home base for 35 years of Part 121 operations.
name: Phoenix Sky Harbor International Airport

description: National parks conservation and stewardship nonprofit. Paul follows park updates while planning trips with Judith.
name: National Park Foundation

description: Aviation training and CRM standards organization. Paul tracks recurrent qualification and human factors guidance.
name: Flight Safety Foundation

description: Aerospace manufacturer of Airbus commercial aircraft. Paul follows fleet and certification news from across the industry.
name: Airbus
